title: Simple Manhunt Mod
description: A mod that adds a manhunt system. /manhunt
body:
# Simple Manhunt Mod

A simple manhunt mod. The mod adds a `/manhunt` command which is where everything you need will be. `/manhunt hunter add` adds you as a hunter, while `/manhunt runner add` adds you as a runner. A runner is required for the compass to work. Right click the tracking compass to track the nearest runner. A tracker compass is automatically given to hunters.

Featured in REL3X's Manhunt vs. Viewers series, check out his channel: https://www.youtube.com/@REL3X_mc
